query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, p.teamId, t.name as teamName
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles p ON p.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN agent_teams t ON t.id = p.teamId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Matthews%' OR u.name LIKE '%matthews%'
ORDER BY u.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute
